name: Avadh Sugar & Energy Limited
summary: Avadh Sugar & Energy Limited manufactures and sells sugar, molasses, bagasse, and press-mud in India. It operates through Sugar, Distillery, Co-generation, and Others segments. The company also manufactures and sells industrial spirits, such as ethanol, as well as fusel oil and bio-compost; and generates and transmits power. In addition, it trades in petroleum products. Avadh Sugar & Energy Limited was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
